title: Purged Arsenal
description: A resource pack for Arsenal (by Doctor4t) that gives it a look that fits Purged (upcoming mod by me and Portix)
body:
This resourcepack is for Doctor4t's mod Arsenal, and changes the textures and names of the Anchorblade and the Scythe to have a gothic kind of vibe. The textures are heavily inspired by our mod Purged, which is currently a WIP.

This resourcepack also doesn't cancel the supporter textures and only changes the default texture, so it's perfect if you are not a supporter, but still want custom weapon skin! (but only new textures, sorry no La-anchor for the loreheads)
